title: Song Wude
content:
Song Wude
 was the attendant of 
Rudy
, the young master of the 
Purple Dao Sect
.

Background
[
]

In the past, he was beaten by the previous Ancestor of 
Origin Sect
 when he attempted to kidnap 
Lu Yanfei
 at Rudy's behest.

History
[
]

After hearing the news of the death of the previous Ancestor of Origin Sect, he stormed the place, once again, attempt to to kidnap Lu Yanfei. However, 
Wang Lin
 killed him before he could harm anyone.
